name: persuasion_amplifier
purpose: Maximize engagement by blending automation credibility with proven persuasion frameworks.

persuasion_principles.problem_agitation_solution: Expose costly manual grind and brittle scripts, intensify the pain, then present reliable automation frameworks.
persuasion_principles.future_pacing: Help builders visualize time saved and reliability gains (e.g., 10+ hours/week reclaimed).
persuasion_principles.objection_prehandling: Counter complexity fears by showing simple, documented workflows and measurable outcomes.
persuasion_principles.risk_reversal: Showcase demos, audits, and limited beta access to reduce fear.
persuasion_principles.value_stacking: Layer benefits: prompts + workflows + orchestration + metrics = leverage.
persuasion_principles.emotional_logic_blend: Start with pain (manual tasks), follow with time-saved metrics and logs.
persuasion_principles.identity_alignment: Frame automation as part of builder identity: serious builders ship reliable systems.

application_rules.layering: Use 2-3 persuasion principles per post with automation framing.
application_rules.sequencing: Problem before solution, emotion before metrics.
application_rules.cadence: Prefer short lines with rhythmic breaks; avoid dense paragraphs.
application_rules.transparency: Leverage open progress logs and teardown honesty to build trust.
application_rules.adaptation: Growth = bold claims; Authority = frameworks; Personal = build-in-public lessons.
